assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddIdentity<ApplicationUser, IdentityRole>() with AddEntityFrameworkStores<ApplicationDbContext>() to register ASP.NET Identity
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows the exact code: AddIdentity<ApplicationUser, IdentityRole>().AddEntityFrameworkStores<ApplicationDbContext>().

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddIdentityServer() followed by .AddAspNetIdentity<ApplicationUser>() to bridge ASP.NET Identity to IdentityServer
Response explains that AddAspNetIdentity registers IProfileService for adding claims to tokens
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md explicitly states AddAspNetIdentity registers IProfileService that uses IUserClaimsPrincipalFactory.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs includes AddDefaultTokenProviders() on the ASP.NET Identity registration
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows .AddDefaultTokenProviders() in the code example.
